# Rinshad — Full-Stack Web & Mobile Engineer

> Mohammed Rinshad M I is a Full-Stack Web & Mobile Engineer based in Palakkad, Kerala, India, with 2.5+ years building and shipping 20+ production web and mobile apps end-to-end on React, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, Golang, and AWS. He builds full-stack products — React and React Native front-ends wired to Node.js and Go APIs — with AI/LLM features (RAG, multi-agent systems, tool/function calling via Claude, OpenAI, LangChain, and the Vercel AI SDK), real-time collaboration, and payment systems (Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay), backed by PostgreSQL + pgvector, Redis, and Docker.

Key facts:
- Role: Full-Stack Web & Mobile Engineer
- Location: Palakkad, Kerala, India (open to remote or relocation)
- Availability: Open to full-stack web & mobile engineering roles
- Email: rinshad803@gmail.com
- Core stack: React, Next.js (App Router · RSC · SSR), React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, Golang, AWS
- Frontend: React, React Native, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, TanStack Query, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js · Express, Golang · Gin, REST, WebSockets, PostgreSQL · pgvector, Redis
- AI/LLM: Gemini, Groq, Ollama (local LLMs), LangChain, Vercel AI SDK, RAG · pgvector · HNSW, embeddings, semantic search, streaming, tool/function calling
- Payments: Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay (webhook-driven order lifecycle)
- Impact: shipped 20+ production features across eCommerce, LMS, and AI platforms; architected 40+ REST API endpoints; cut API latency 35%; raised Lighthouse from 62 to 89 (3.8s → 2.1s load); processed 2,000+ monthly transactions; led a live JS→TypeScript migration across web and mobile; cut build times 60% (CRA → Vite)

## Pages

- [Home](https://rinshad.dev): Overview, positioning, and featured work
- [Work](https://rinshad.dev/work): Case studies of production systems

- [Contact](https://rinshad.dev/contact): Get in touch

## Case studies

Self-initiated projects built to explore production patterns in AI, real-time systems, and cloud-native architecture. Source: https://github.com/MohdRinshadmi

- [AI Life Assistant Super App](https://rinshad.dev/work/ai-life-assistant): A streaming, voice-first AI copilot with tool-calling, speech-to-text, TTS playback, and live agent traces in React Server Components, grounded in a RAG knowledge base with sub-second HNSW retrieval and JWT refresh-token rotation. Stack: Next.js, Node.js, Python, Gemini API, pgvector · HNSW, Redis. Code: https://github.com/MohdRinshadmi/ai-life-assistant
- [AI-Powered Real-Time Collaboration Platform](https://rinshad.dev/work/realtime-collab-platform): A Yjs CRDT collaborative editor with live presence and inline AI assistance, handling many concurrent clients conflict-free over a stateless WebSocket layer fanned out via Redis Pub/Sub, with end-to-end Playwright tests. Stack: Next.js, Yjs (CRDT), WebSockets, Redis Pub/Sub, Docker. Code: https://github.com/MohdRinshadmi/ai-real-time-collaboration
- [Cloud-Native IoT Analytics Platform](https://rinshad.dev/work/iot-analytics-dashboard): A type-safe React client over 15+ Go/Gin REST APIs structured with Clean Architecture and a service/repository split, six services orchestrated with Docker Compose. Stack: React, Golang · Gin, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker. Code: https://github.com/MohdRinshadmi/cloud-native-iot-dashboard

## Writing

- [Next.js Performance Patterns](https://rinshad.dev/blog/nextjs-performance-patterns): Practical patterns for fast React Server Component apps.

## FAQ

- What kind of developer is Rinshad? A full-stack web & mobile engineer working end-to-end: React, Next.js, and React Native front-ends wired to Node.js and Golang REST APIs, backed by PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker.
- Is he available for hire? Yes — open to full-stack web & mobile engineering roles, remote across India and worldwide or on-site with relocation. Email rinshad803@gmail.com (usually replies within 24h).
- Does he build AI/LLM features? Yes — streaming AI copilots, RAG over pgvector with HNSW indexing, semantic search, tool/function calling, and multi-agent workflows with LangChain and the Vercel AI SDK.
- Does he build mobile apps? Yes — cross-platform React Native apps published to the Apple App Store and Google Play Store, including an offline-first geolocation tracking system.
- What results has he delivered? Cut API latency 35% across 40+ Express endpoints, raised Lighthouse 62→89 (3.8s→2.1s), processed 2,000+ monthly transactions, and cut build times 60% (CRA→Vite).
- Where is he based? Palakkad, Kerala, India; works as a Software Engineer in Calicut; open to relocation (UAE/Dubai, Germany, UK).
